name: escalated-dev/escalated-filament
description: Filament admin panel integration for the Escalated support ticket system

ignore.PKSA-mdq4-51ck-6kdq: laravel/framework 11.x advisory; affects all released 11.x with no advisory-clean version, which Composer 2.9+ excludes during resolution and breaks the L^11 compatibility matrix. Root config only (CI/test matrix); does not propagate to host apps.
ignore.PKSA-8qx3-n5y5-vvnd: laravel/framework 11.x advisory; CI compat matrix only (see above).
ignore.PKSA-q46n-4fdk-zjr4: laravel/framework 11.x advisory; CI compat matrix only (see above).
ignore.PKSA-qzrn-rnz3-85w1: laravel/framework 11.x advisory; CI compat matrix only (see above).
ignore.PKSA-w7xr-vk7n-rstm: laravel/framework 11.x advisory; CI compat matrix only (see above).
ignore.PKSA-ndkp-2znf-9m7c: filament/actions advisory; affects every released Filament 5.x with no advisory-clean version, which Composer 2.9+ excludes during resolution and breaks the F^5.0 compatibility matrix. Composer still caps at <5.5.0 via the conflict block below. Root config only (CI/test matrix); does not propagate to host apps.
